name: santander-automation
description: Playwright automation framework for Santander Boost

scripts.test:santander-stage: cross-env CLIENT=santander ENV=stage playwright test tests/santander --project=chromium
scripts.test:santander-stage:auth: cross-env CLIENT=santander ENV=stage playwright test tests/santander/auth.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:santander-stage:home: cross-env CLIENT=santander ENV=stage playwright test tests/santander/home.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.allure:generate: cross-env JAVA_HOME="C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17" allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report
scripts.allure:open: cross-env JAVA_HOME="C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17" allure open allure-report
scripts.allure:report: cross-env JAVA_HOME="C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17" allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && cross-env JAVA_HOME="C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17" allure open allure-report
